sentences.text: The Linnet continued with his story, hoping the Water-rat would understand the lesson.
The Water-rat listened carefully, eager to hear more about Hans and his adventures.
The Water-rat asked a question, and the Linnet replied that the man was not famous, but he had a kind heart and a funny, friendly face.
He lived alone in a small cottage, and he worked in his garden every day.
